TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_tadamicidekay_a_imelang_nu_baluwang, title = tadamicidekay_a_imelang_nu_baluwang, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/tadamicidekay_a_imelang_nu_baluwang} }

S.FORM: == kakaliman == tadamicidekay a imelang nu baluwangŤāļÁôĆ musaciid i baluwang tu ledeb palamit a mulahad mucelek, anu caay paiyu i sa, mangaleb pilahad tatacuwa, u matalay nu mitaaidas, miledek ku edes, talabangs amulahad, sa adidik a misengi ya katinenga i tasa, mahihiuh, u ti'ih ku udip, muhanhan a dada ku bauuwang makudus tu. 85% katineng nu siimelangay sa namu tabakuway a tademaw, 10%-15% na caay pitabak u duma sa, namakay baba lakiyaimalalid, makahelip tuangliway bali, anabuh saka tusa a tabaku, idaunay misakupaay, sasingn ku baluwang, masametek kiyamicidek kaya imelang. Ś§ßŚ§öśēł(85%) XŚÖČśąĖśĖ∑ŚĪ§śéÉśŹŹ(CT) CTŚľēŚįéšłčťÄ≤Ť°ĆśīĽś™ĘÁĘļŤ®ļ. milawaay tu hanhan, 1.mahihhih 2.siisdang 3.masuni 4.u tiih ku hanhan. sakay udip, 1.makudus 2.masiyan 3.akuti' 4.makelulup ku kakanus. cidekay anu masakatil tu, 1.adada ku baluwang 2.adada ku ukak. 3.mipuet tu sahanhan. 4.utiih sae'nuc. anu i hahan'hana kiy cidekay sa amapu'et ku hanhan nu misu tu malawa' ku ta'en u cawa misu, anu masaupu ku tuutuud i talulaw sa, apihaceng tu masied kiyabala' kiya.
S.PHON: == kakar~…ĺiman == tadami ¶id…ôkaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu bar~…ĺuwaŇč** musa ¶iid i bar~…ĺuwaŇč tu r~…ĺ…ôd…ôb par~…ĺamit a mur~…ĺańßad mu ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ôk, anu ¶aaj paiju i sa, maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb pir~…ĺańßad tata ¶uwa, u matar~…ĺaj nu mitaaidas, mir~…ĺ…ôd…ôk ku …ôd…ôs, tar~…ĺabaŇčs amur~…ĺańßad, sa adidik a mis…ôŇči ja katin…ôŇča i tasa, mańßińßiuńß, u ti Ē~ °ińß ku udip, muńßanńßan a dada ku bauuwaŇč makudus tu. **% katin…ôŇč nu siim…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj sa namu tabakuwaj a tad…ômaw, **%-**% na ¶aaj pitabak u duma sa, namakaj baba r~…ĺakijaimar~…ĺar~…ĺid, makańß…ôr~…ĺip tuaŇčr~…ĺiwaj bar~…ĺi, anabuńß saka tusa a tabaku, idaunaj misakupaaj, sasiŇčn ku bar~…ĺuwaŇč, masam…ôt…ôk kijami ¶id…ôk kaja im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. ***(**%) *******( ¶t) ¶t*********. mir~…ĺawaaj tu ńßanńßan, *.mańßińßńßińß *.siisdaŇč *.masuni *.u tiińß ku ńßanńßan. sakaj udip, *.makudus *.masijan *.akuti Ē~ ° *.mak…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺup ku kakanus. ¶id…ôkaj anu masakatir~…ĺ tu, *.adada ku bar~…ĺuwaŇč *.adada ku ukak. *.mipu…ôt tu sańßanńßan. *.utiińß sa…ô Ē~ °nu ¶. anu i ńßańßan Ē~ °ńßana kij ¶id…ôkaj sa amapu Ē~ °…ôt ku ńßanńßan nu misu tu mar~…ĺawa Ē~ ° ku ta Ē~ °…ôn u ¶awa misu, anu masaupu ku tuutuud i tar~…ĺur~…ĺaw sa, apińßa ¶…ôŇč tu masi…ôd kijabar~…ĺa Ē~ ° kija.
S.FORM: == kakaliman == tadamicidekay a imelang nu baluwangŤāļÁôĆ musaciid i baluwang tu ledeb palamit a mulahad mucelek, anu caay paiyu i sa, mangaleb pilahad tatacuwa, u matalay nu mitaaidas, miledek ku edes, talabangs amulahad, sa adidik a misengi ya katinenga i tasa, mahihiuh, u ti'ih ku udip, muhanhan a dada ku bauuwang makudus tu. 85% katineng nu siimelangay sa namu tabakuway a tademaw, 10%-15% na caay pitabak u duma sa, namakay baba lakiyaimalalid, makahelip tuangliway bali, anabuh saka tusa a tabaku, idaunay misakupaay, sasingn ku baluwang, masametek kiyamicidek kaya imelang. Ś§ßŚ§öśēł(85%) XŚÖČśąĖśĖ∑ŚĪ§śéÉśŹŹ(CT) CTŚľēŚįéšłčťÄ≤Ť°ĆśīĽś™ĘÁĘļŤ®ļ. milawaay tu hanhan, 1.mahihhih 2.siisdang 3.masuni 4.u tiih ku hanhan. sakay udip, 1.makudus 2.masiyan 3.akuti' 4.makelulup ku kakanus. cidekay anu masakatil tu, 1.adada ku baluwang 2.adada ku ukak. 3.mipuet tu sahanhan. 4.utiih sae'nuc. anu i hahan'hana kiy cidekay sa amapu'et ku hanhan nu misu tu malawa' ku ta'en u cawa misu, anu masaupu ku tuutuud i talulaw sa, apihaceng tu masied kiyabala' kiya.
S.PHON: == kakar~…ĺiman == tadami ¶id…ôkaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu bar~…ĺuwaŇč** musa ¶iid i bar~…ĺuwaŇč tu r~…ĺ…ôd…ôb par~…ĺamit a mur~…ĺańßad mu ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ôk, anu ¶aaj paiju i sa, maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb pir~…ĺańßad tata ¶uwa, u matar~…ĺaj nu mitaaidas, mir~…ĺ…ôd…ôk ku …ôd…ôs, tar~…ĺabaŇčs amur~…ĺańßad, sa adidik a mis…ôŇči ja katin…ôŇča i tasa, mańßińßiuńß, u ti Ē~ °ińß ku udip, muńßanńßan a dada ku bauuwaŇč makudus tu. **% katin…ôŇč nu siim…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj sa namu tabakuwaj a tad…ômaw, **%-**% na ¶aaj pitabak u duma sa, namakaj baba r~…ĺakijaimar~…ĺar~…ĺid, makańß…ôr~…ĺip tuaŇčr~…ĺiwaj bar~…ĺi, anabuńß saka tusa a tabaku, idaunaj misakupaaj, sasiŇčn ku bar~…ĺuwaŇč, masam…ôt…ôk kijami ¶id…ôk kaja im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. ***(**%) *******( ¶t) ¶t*********. mir~…ĺawaaj tu ńßanńßan, *.mańßińßńßińß *.siisdaŇč *.masuni *.u tiińß ku ńßanńßan. sakaj udip, *.makudus *.masijan *.akuti Ē~ ° *.mak…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺup ku kakanus. ¶id…ôkaj anu masakatir~…ĺ tu, *.adada ku bar~…ĺuwaŇč *.adada ku ukak. *.mipu…ôt tu sańßanńßan. *.utiińß sa…ô Ē~ °nu ¶. anu i ńßańßan Ē~ °ńßana kij ¶id…ôkaj sa amapu Ē~ °…ôt ku ńßanńßan nu misu tu mar~…ĺawa Ē~ ° ku ta Ē~ °…ôn u ¶awa misu, anu masaupu ku tuutuud i tar~…ĺur~…ĺaw sa, apińßa ¶…ôŇč tu masi…ôd kijabar~…ĺa Ē~ ° kija.
